title: Investigate KESB-145 — "All Portal Logins" page column headers confusing customers (org 9624)
description:
Triage and write-back for KESB-145 (org 9624).

**Goal:** Clarify column header confusion on the "All Portal Logins" page and file a UI improvement issue.

**Findings:**

* Navigation bugs (404 on "View all portal logins") are resolved — <issue id="703e20db-e07d-4e43-b004-701d9b7597d8" href="https://linear.app/kn-eng/issue/GEN-1872/fix-view-all-n-portal-logins-link-on-credentials-page-to-open-the-full">GEN-1872</issue> (Done), <issue id="9fdc4acb-13d7-4256-a2f1-ea7da8191151" href="https://linear.app/kn-eng/issue/GEN-1946/fix-view-all-portal-logins-404-on-partner-beta-credentials-page">GEN-1946</issue> (Done).
* The page exists at `apps/web-app/src/app/(location)/(member)/credentials/all/page.tsx`.
* Customer complaint is about column comprehension, not broken links.
* No existing Linear issue tracks column header simplification for this page.
* Small UI work required: simplify/rename column headers, consider tooltips. No backend changes needed.

**Acceptance criteria:**

* New Linear issue filed for column header simplification
* Write-back comment posted to KESB-145 acknowledging feedback and linking tracking issue
* Triage plan updated

**Source:** [https://revenuewell.atlassian.net/browse/KESB-145](<https://revenuewell.atlassian.net/browse/KESB-145>)
